title: cordylanthus kingii
intro: Cordylanthus kingii, also known as King's Indian pipe, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family, native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cordylanthus kingii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Cordylanthus kingii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
